flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 27% at Mount Saint Mary College vs the 2018–2022 baseline (1.3k vs 1.7k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Mount Saint Mary College fell 26% between 2021 and 2024 (1.6k → 1.1k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Mount Saint Mary College rose 20% between 2021 and 2024 ($36.1k → $43.5k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Mount Saint Mary College rose 20% between 2006 and 2009 ($18.3k → $21.9k).
